description: Modulation → euclid.a.hits. A stepped unipolar LFO ramps the euclidean hit count up from the base of 2 hits/bar; the rendered onset count must be far above the un-modulated base. Proves the Stage-A/B euclid pattern recompute path (tryUpdatePatternFromModulation). Un-modulated yields ~4 onsets over the render; modulated yields ~16 — threshold 8 sits between.

assertions.name: audio_present
assertions.comment: kicks must be audible to be counted as onsets

assertions.name: hit_density_raised_by_modulation
assertions.comment: modulation pushes hit density to ~16 onsets; un-modulated base is ~4
